title: Dog Tie Out Cable and Stake, Heavy Duty Dog Spikes for Ground, Dog Stake Dog Tether for Camping, Puppy Pet Dog Stake and Dog Leash for Outdoor, Backyard or Camping (1.8m)
features: 【Durable Material】The dog stake is made of 9mm diameter high quality stainless steel, equipped with 360 degree metal swivel ring, sturdy and durable, not easy to break, the dog leash is made of steel wire rope wrapped with PVC material, effective bite-proof and rust-resistant, strong enough to withstand up to 130 pounds of dog pulling force.

【Strong Spiral Fixing Design】The ergonomically designed handle and unique spiral structure make the dog stake easily screwed into the grass, sand and even rocky ground, providing a strong grip and preventing the dog from loosening when dragging and pulling, so you can use it with more peace of mind and no worries.

【Free Activity Solution】Whether it's an outdoor camping adventure, family picnic time, a stroll in the park, or a backyard workout, simply tether your dog to this dog stake and free your hands to enjoy your personal time freely. The dog stake ensures the safety of your beloved pet while giving them plenty of range of motion.

【Easy to Use】Grip the handle of the dog stake, stand it vertically on the ground, turn it clockwise to make it deep into the soil, then connect one end of the leash to the swivel ring of the dog stake, and the other end is fixed to the dog's collar or leash, and then your dog is free to explore instantly.

【Wide Application】 This dog leash stake is an ideal companion for a wide range of outdoor activities, whether it's a patio, garden, campsite, park, or beach. In addition, it has the flexibility to be used directly hanging from trees or fences to meet diverse needs.
description: Product Description Aleker Heavy Duty Dog Tie Out Cable and Stake, Dog Stake for Outdoor, Backyard or Camping High Quality Material: Our dog stake for camping is made of high quality stainless steel, with a 360 degree swivel ring for durability and resistance to breakage. Strong Spiral Fixing Design: With ergonomic handle and spiral design, strong gripping effect, you don't need to worry that the dog stake will be yanked out by your dog. Easy to Use: Screw the stake clockwise into the ground, then hang one end of the leash on the 360° swivel ring of the stake and the other end on the dog's leash. 5mm wire rope, effectively prevent the dog from breaking free, suitable for dogs under 60kg. Non-slip Plastic Handle Ergonomic design for a comfortable grip and ABS material for durability, easy to install with one hand. 360° Rotatable Steel Ring Steel rope hook, all-round 360 degree rotation, prevents knots and tangles. Sharp Drill Bit Stainless steel material, the bevelled design for easy insertion into the soil. Sturdy Wire Strong, reliable wire rope that can hold up to 1700lbs and is suitable for most dogs.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always ensure the stake is securely inserted into the ground before attaching the leash. Be cautious when handling the sharp pointed end during installation and removal. Avoid contact with harsh chemicals or extreme temperatures to maintain the durability of the stainless steel.
